item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
json=\""'$root/config/onboarding.json"
doc="$root/docs/onboarding.md"
printf '"'%s\\n' '--- FINAL CONFIG'
nl -ba \""'$json"
printf '"'%s\\n' '--- FINAL DOCS'
nl -ba \""'$doc"

files=$(find "$root" -type f | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$json" "$doc" | sort)
[ "$files" = "$expected" ]
printf '"'ROOT-001 PASS exact two requested files\\n'

jq -e '. == {schema_version: 2, mode: \"streaming\", max_parallel: 3, owner: \"operations\", queues: [\"new\", \"recovery\"]}' \""'$json" >/dev/null
printf '"'CFG-001 PASS exact values and queue order\\n'

jq -e '(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and (.mode|type)==\"string\" and (.max_parallel|type)==\"number\" and (.owner|type)==\"string\" and (.queues|type)==\"array\" and all(.queues[]; type==\"string\")' \""'$json" >/dev/null
printf '"'CFG-002 PASS requested JSON types\\n'

[ \""'$(awk '"'/"'^```/{n++} END{print n+0}'"' \""'$doc")" -eq 2 ]
rg -q '"'streaming mode for the operations owner' \""'$doc"
rg -q '"'the "'`new` queue before `recovery`'"' \""'$doc"
rg -q -- '"'--config config/onboarding.json' \""'$doc"
rg -q -- '"'--mode streaming' \""'$doc"
rg -q -- '"'--max-parallel 3' \""'$doc"
rg -q -- '"'--owner operations' \""'$doc"
q1_line=$(rg -n -- '"'--queue new' \""'$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
q2_line=$(rg -n -- '"'--queue recovery' \""'$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
[ "$q1_line" -lt "$q2_line" ]
printf '"'DOC-001 PASS one example; prose/example agree with JSON\\n'

set +e
stale="'$(rg -n -i '"'batch|fallback|retry' \""'$root" 2>&1)
stale_exit=$?
set -e
[ "$stale_exit" -eq 1 ]
printf '"'STALE-001 PASS no batch, fallback, or retry references\\n'

set +e
repro="'$(rg -n -i '"'generated_at|timestamp|created_at|updated_at|2026-07-18|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}([Tt ][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2}(\\.[0-9]+)?)?([Zz]|[+-][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2})?)?|\\b[0-9]{10}([0-9]{3})?\\b' \""'$json" "$doc" 2>&1)
repro_exit=$?
set -e
[ "$repro_exit" -eq 1 ]
printf '"'REPRO-001 PASS no generated_at, timestamps, today, ISO dates, or epoch-like values\\n'

printf 'RECONCILIATION PASS\\n'"

item.aggregated_output:
--- FINAL CONFIG
     1	{
     2	  "schema_version": 2,
     3	  "mode": "streaming",
     4	  "max_parallel": 3,
     5	  "owner": "operations",
     6	  "queues": [
     7	    "new",
     8	    "recovery"
     9	  ]
    10	}
--- FINAL DOCS
     1	# Onboarding
     2	
     3	Run onboarding in streaming mode for the operations owner, processing the `new` queue before `recovery` with up to three jobs in parallel:
     4	
     5	```sh
     6	onboarding run \
     7	  --config config/onboarding.json \
     8	  --mode streaming \
     9	  --max-parallel 3 \
    10	  --owner operations \
    11	  --queue new \
    12	  --queue recovery
    13	```
ROOT-001 PASS exact two requested files
CFG-001 PASS exact values and queue order
CFG-002 PASS requested JSON types
DOC-001 PASS one example; prose/example agree with JSON
STALE-001 PASS no batch, fallback, or retry references
REPRO-001 PASS no generated_at, timestamps, today, ISO dates, or epoch-like values
RECONCILIATION PASS

- [config/onboarding.json](/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json)
  - Schema version `2`
  - Mode `streaming`
  - Maximum parallelism `3`
  - Owner `operations`
  - Queue order `new` → `recovery`
  - Correct JSON types

- [docs/onboarding.md](/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md)
  - Exactly one runnable-looking example
  - Prose and command agree with the JSON
  - Uses `streaming` and `new` → `recovery`
